== Notes for [[Item:Q88573|Q88573]] ==

ID: I62251

Name: of Assyria

Surname: of Assyria

Sex: M

_UID: DB7F9F78702C9C449C1AE4EEE5B71994BE9E

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Father: Assur-etil of Assyria

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Nabubalatsuigbi of Harran

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I62251

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per04130.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
Prince of Syria

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
